LightningComponentBundle.description: Modularized Term Builder header tile: Account/negotiation picker, editable name, Create/View Contract. Syncs with the Terms Rail and Term Workspace over the DLM Term Builder message channel.

property.name: accountId
property.label: Preselected Account Id
property.description: Optional Account Id to preselect on load. Usually left blank; the tile also honors a c__accountId URL parameter for deep links from an Account page.

property.name: quoteRecordId
property.label: Preselected Negotiation (Quote) Id
property.description: Optional Quote Id to open directly on load; its Account is loaded automatically. Usually left blank; the tile also honors a c__quoteId URL parameter for deep links into a specific negotiation.

property.name: headingLabel
property.label: Heading Label
property.description: Title shown in the tile's navy header band.

property.name: showBranding
property.label: Show Delta Branding
property.description: Show the Delta emblem in the header band. Turn off for a plainer heading.

property.name: showContractActions
property.label: Show Contract Actions
property.description: Show the Create Contract / View Contract action in the header.

property.name: showDateDefaults
property.label: Show Default Dates + Apply to All (no effect)
property.description: Deprecated. The default date fields and Apply-to-All button were removed from the header layout; this property is retained only because existing Lightning pages reference it and has no effect.
